title: Epic: Versioned Package Storage & Distribution Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Exposes package search and fetch APIs
notes: Foundational epic for drover-registry package management and OCI integration.

title: Storage provider engine configuration
acceptance_criteria: Integrates securely with S3 or GCS backends for tarball package storage
Supports local disk fallback storage for staging/offline development
Verifies file hashes during write operations to prevent chunk degradation
notes: Handles the physical storage backend integrations.

title: Version indexing & metadata API parser
acceptance_criteria: Extracts name, version, and dependencies from uploaded agent manifests
Maintains database indices of package versions
notes: Manages package version indexing and JSON metadata schemas.

title: Zitadel OIDC authentication & scope checks
acceptance_criteria: Verifies OIDC tokens on push and pull endpoints
Enforces Zitadel Org ID scope matching to isolate tenant packages
Returns correct 401/403 HTTP boundaries for invalid tokens

title: Webhook publisher for Muster synchronization
acceptance_criteria: Dispatches webhook event to drover-muster upon successful package publication
Payload includes name, version, checksum, and tool signatures
Handles retry backoffs for failed webhook deliveries
notes: Coordinates package publication with the capability governance engine.

title: High-performance package streaming endpoint
acceptance_criteria: Endpoint streams .tar.gz archives with low latency
Implements compression filters and range requests
Verifies checksums during transport to ensure package integrity
notes: Optimizes download streams for microVM and orchestrator fetches.
